case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. PEDRO ANTONIO CARTAGENA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-24-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT PADRO ANTONIO CARTAGENA IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JUN-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARTAGENA, PEDRO ANTONIO
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARTAGENA, PEDRO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
